content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -1.06%, IT collapsing -5.29%, VIX up 4.5% to 19.43 — risk-off tone with IT earnings selloff leading. However, defensive sectors (FMCG, Pharma, Metals) showing relative strength and my book is tilted defensively which is working. Book is 68% deployed with net-flat session P&L — deployment hysteresis rule applies: default disposition for new entries is NO_ACTION unless setup is materially better than what I hold.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "CMP 76.87 above SL 74.50 (buffer ~3.1%). Thesis intact: Q4 FY26 +35% PAT growth, GNPA 1.45%, NIM 3.95% best-in-class. Stock consolidating after Apr 21 rally. Not trailing SL yet as position is in loss (-5.5%); tightening would risk premature exit. Let existing SL hold. Exit if closes below 75 convincingly."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1013.22,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op check: current SL already at 1013.22 which is ABOVE entry 984 (locks in ~3% gain). Target 1100 intact. Position +4.8%. Per the no-op MODIFY rule, since both values unchanged, this should be HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Defensive gold ETF, -0.8% drag but structural bull thesis intact (geopolitical, INR weak, central bank buying). SL 119 gives ~4% buffer. No action needed; let it hedge the book."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1412.94,
      "new_target": 1480.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.8% near 52-wk high. Current SL 1410 is essentially at entry (1412.94). Moving SL precisely to entry (breakeven) per trailing mandate. Strong Q4 beat, broker upgrades (Citi 1675, Nuvama 1640) support holding for target 1480. FMCG defensive leader working in weak tape."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1049.05,
      "new_target": 1130.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.7%, unrealized gain triggers breakeven trail. Current SL 1049 is at entry. Q4 results Apr 27 (binary event risk) — want SL locked at entry to protect capital across earnings. Stock well above consensus PT Rs 600-720 so valuation stretched; earnings miss = sharp correction risk. Tight SL at entry is prudent."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Position +0.9%. Current SL 672 below entry 681 — gain too small to trail to breakeven yet (threshold is +2%). Q4 results Apr 29 — will reassess then. Stock at 52-wk high, at top of analyst target band — earnings risk exists. Keep SL as-is to give room."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Down -2.3%, but SL 2260 gives ~2.3% further buffer before trigger. Q4 results Apr 30 upcoming. Stock pulled back today on FMCG-specific weakness but thesis (structural franchise, pricing power, defensive) intact. Exit if breaks 2260 decisively or if Apr 30 print disappoints."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Marginally down -0.8%, SL 393 has ~2% buffer. Q4 earnings May 15. Defensive utility with RE optionality. ESG upgrade provides passive flow tailwind. Hold through weakness."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "OFSS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 beat (+30% PAT, >50% EBIT margin) and Rs 270/share dividend is genuinely attractive, but stock already +9% on results. In a -5% IT sector selloff I don't want to chase a single name even if fundamentally decoupled. Book already 68% deployed. Revisit on a pullback toward 8400-8500."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HSCL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Fresh 52-wk high with +6.46% day move but intraday reversal from 605 to 571 shows exhaustion. Apr 27 earnings = event risk. Pass given book already deployed and risk-off tape."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ONESOURCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "5-day run +13.74%, parabolic, 3.3x volume — classic late-cycle momentum. Intraday reversal from 1863 to 1841 signals distribution. Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "CLEAN",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.35,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "12.8x volume with flat price is distribution, not accumulation — intraday high 820 rejected, closed 802 near low of day. Promoter sold 24% stake recently, -36% 1-yr return. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Apr 29 earnings event risk too close. Jefferies top pick but also highest US tariff exposure (~23%). Near 52-wk range upper portion. Wait for post-earnings clarity."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "EMCURE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Social-media controversy overhang plus voluntary 47-55% price cut on key product. Intraday fade from 1678 to 1647 weak. Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "IPCALAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Trading window closed, premium P/E 40x vs 8-12% growth outlook. No edge pre-earnings. Pass."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Position in loss; keep SL at 74.50 to give thesis room to play out. Thesis intact post Q4 beat."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at 1013.22 locking in ~3% gain, above entry. Target 1100 unchanged. No modification needed."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive anchor, small drag acceptable. SL at 119 gives adequate buffer."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1412.94,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL to exact entry (breakeven). 52-wk high with strong Q4 beat, broker targets 1640-1675; letting winner run with zero downside risk."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1049.05,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL to entry ahead of Apr 27 Q4 earnings. Valuation stretched vs consensus; protect capital through binary event."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Gain too small (+0.9%) to trail yet. SL 672 provides room ahead of Apr 29 earnings."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Down -2.3% today but thesis intact. SL 2260 has buffer. Apr 30 earnings will be the decider."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Minor drag; SL 393 has 2% buffer. Hold through chop."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "OFSS on pullback to 8400-8500 post dividend ex-date (May 7) — genuine fundamental outperformer. NAVINFLUOR post Apr 29 earnings for post-event re-entry. PNBHOUSING already owned and performing. HSCL/ONESOURCE pass — extended setups on an event-risk-heavy week.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 68% deployed (near hysteresis threshold of 60%), tilted defensively across FMCG (NESTLEIND, HINDUNILVR), Gold (GOLDBEES), PSU utility (NTPC), Pharma (GRANULES), Financials (PNBHOUSING, AUBANK, MAHABANK). Three earnings events next week (AUBANK Apr 27, NAVINFLUOR+GRANULES Apr 29, HINDUNILVR Apr 30) — SLs now trailed to entry on winners. Banking cluster (AUBANK + PNBHOUSING + MAHABANK) is ~26% of capital — at caution threshold, will not add more to financials. Total P&L +0.24% — small and within noise; focus remains capital preservation in elevated VIX environment."
}
